rationale: The claimed Iran settlement and market surge offer marginal relief on energy costs relevant to Romania, while the war near Romania's border continues without new escalation.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', markets surge
top_events.summary: Stock and energy markets reacted positively; potential easing of energy costs relevant to Romania's import-dependent economy.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Confirmed El Niño raises risk of agricultural disruption and extreme weather across Europe including the Black Sea region.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in Lebanon / Gaza ongoing
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East escalation sustains energy market uncertainty indirectly affecting Romanian import costs.
